ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the bank is located */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the bank */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the bank in billions of USD */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the bank's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the current CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the bank's official website */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used by the bank */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary data source for the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions of USD */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the bank */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Name of the ranking source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the ranking methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "balance_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the balance sheet belongs to */,
  "balance_sheet_date" TEXT /* Date the balance sheet was recorded */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the bank */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the bank */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the bank */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the bank */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit of the bank */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Total cash flow of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the financial data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data (e.g., revenue, profit) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bank */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bank was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the feed comes from */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the feed is about */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data from the feed */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date when the data feed was recorded */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., financial, market, news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
